headline: Is It Too Late To Consider FedEx (FDX) After A 52% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether FedEx is still fairly priced after its big run, or if the current share price gives you enough margin of safety, this article will walk through what the numbers are actually saying about value. FedEx shares last closed at US$361.39, with returns of 23.3% year to date and 51.7% over the past year, even after a 5.9% pullback over the last 7 days and a 0.9% decline over the past month. Recent headlines around FedEx have kept attention on the stock, including ongoing...
